docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY TAE, MIKE YI, SUNKYU (DRIVER) YI, KYEONG SOOK (OWNER AND/OR POLICY HOLDER)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($0.00: WAIVER) SERVED OCT-25-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YI, SUNKYU (DRIVER)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2017 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JAN-18-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. KOREAN INTERPRETER REQUESTED FOR BOTH PARTIES. ASSITED WITH KOREAN INTERPRETATION BY JAMES PARK WHO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH. DEFENDANTS SUNYU YI AND KYELONG YI ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAE, MIKE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YI, SUNKYU (DRIVER) YI, KYEONG SOOK (OWNER AND/OR POLICY HOLDER) $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DEFENDANTS SUNYU YI AND KYELONG YI ARE PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SONG PARK, KOREAN INTERPRETER. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2018 - JUDGMENT.
